Input

Output
0 XNOR36 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
1 XNOR47 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 NOT5 = NOT(0) = 1
3 NOT6 = NOT(1) = 0
4 NOT7 = NOT(1) = 0
5 NOT0 = NOT(1) = 0

\boxed{11100001}
